_note: SFX plan for video-1 (konten.com 500jt promo). 5 cues, sparse & function-first per brand.md §10. Cues synced to edited-transcript.json word times AND the visual beat (shot animation frames). Voice is ~-17 LUFS; per-cue gain_db set so SFX stay under voice. Light sidechain duck applied by mix_sfx.py.

events.note: transition whoosh at master_in_s of the cutaway. Sets the punch before the number reveals.
soft impact lands exactly on the payoff word. Layered with the whoosh: whoosh transitions IN, impact punctuates the number.

events.cue: browser URL bar finishes typing 'konten.com' (shot local f42 / 30fps = 1.4s into a 3.0s shot, master 9.20+1.40=10.60)
events.note: tiny UI tick on the URL 'enter'. Faint by design — the URL typing animation already does the visual work.
hero payoff. Pops exactly as the calculator's highlight sweep finishes.
closing chime. Reward-sound = 'go claim it'. Lands as the CTA pill nudges with the arrow.
